TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Buner, title = Buner, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Buner} }

S.FORM: alang Buner ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,710 buwan, 4,775 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 1,133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 3,642 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 21%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Buner hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Buner hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Buner hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Buner hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Buner hya' ga Fulufuluan. tay mkyahu' na Buner hya' ga Natawran. tay 'zil na Buner hya' ga Ciripunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Buner ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,710 buwan, 4,775 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 1,133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 3,642 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 21%, Truku 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Buner hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Buner hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Buner hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Buner hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Buner hya' ga Fulufuluan. tay mkyahu' na Buner hya' ga Natawran. tay 'zil na Buner hya' ga Ciripunan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βuner ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βunun *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βuner ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na βuner ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na βuner ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βuner ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βuner ħjaʔ ɣa *ulu*uluan. taj mkjaħuʔ na βuner ħjaʔ ɣa natawran. taj ʔzil na βuner ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiripunan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
